title: devforge config
description: Stage, model, oracle, and loop-limit settings for devforge runs.

stages.description: Engine and model assignments for each devforge stage. Single stages (verify, architect, implementer, success_criteria, fulfillment) are optional: when absent, the built-in role table drives the stage without an engine.

reviewers.description: Roster for inner-loop reviewers. The design gate selects a per-run subset.

final_reviewers.description: Roster for post-convergence reviewers. May be empty.

oracle.description: Deterministic checks that must pass before reviewers can approve.

commands.description: Finite, non-mutating shell commands such as type checks, lint checks, builds, and targeted tests.

limits.description: Default loop bounds before the design gate chooses run-specific limits.

final_review_rounds.description: Maximum targeted reopen rounds from final-review findings.

plan_mode_gate.description: For any agent that has a plan mode (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, …). When true (default), present the generic design gate through plan mode as an adapter: accepting the plan approves, rejecting or editing it revises; falls back to the chat gate if plan tools error or are unavailable. Set false for agents without a plan mode or for headless runs; the chat + _design.approved gate is the portable mechanism either way.

stageValue.description: One stage assignment. `use` names a registry entry; `model` is optional.

use.description: Registry `use` name for the engine that fills this stage.

model.description: Model override for this stage, such as opus or sonnet.
